name: balanceWorkload
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.members === undefined || output.result.members.every(m => Number.isFinite(m.utilization))
output.ok === false || output.result.members === undefined || output.result.members.every(m => Number.isFinite(m.totalHours))
output.ok === false || output.result.members === undefined || output.result.members.every(m => Number.isFinite(m.capacity))
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (CollabActionPanel.actLoad channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). Empty members → { message } empty-shape. Else per-member: assigned = tasks where t.assignee === m.name; totalHours = sum(finiteNum(t.hours ?? t.estimatedHours, 2) || 2); capacity = max(1, finiteNum(m.capacityHours,40) || 40); utilization = round(totalHours/capacity*100); status overloaded (>cap) / near-capacity (>0.8 cap) / available; unassignedTasks = tasks with no assignee; overloadedMembers = count overloaded; avgUtilization = round(mean(util)); suggestions = ['Move tasks from <overloaded> to <available>'] when both exist. Fail-CLOSED numerics: finiteNum() so 'Infinity'/'NaN'/'12abc' fall to the 40h/2h defaults (parseFloat would have leaked Infinity into utilization/capacity, or accepted '12abc' as 12). Result card renders avgUtilization/overloadedMembers/unassignedTasks/members[].{name,status,utilization,totalHours,capacity,assignedTasks}/suggestions EXACTLY (verified field-for-field against CollabActionPanel.tsx 2026-06-28).
